case_title: MPV I, LLC VS. ANGELA LAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MPV I, LLC
